1 = Limitation on one side, 2 = Limitation on both sides, "-" = Unknown.
241 G4FB G4FB_OTH_MOVE (G4FB) Other Limitation of Voluntary Movement CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - other limitations or loss - voluntary movement. 0 = No Loss, 1 = Partial Loss, 2 = Full Loss, "-" = Unknown.
242 G5A G5A_CANE_CRUTCH (G5A) Cane/Walker/Crutch CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of locomotion in last 7 days
